summary.intent: Recreate and push PR #190 (settings-system-prompt feature) as PR #466 after a repo history rewrite caused the original branch to diverge from main.
summary.outcome: PR #466 was successfully created with the same title and description as #190, but CI failed due to unintended CHANGELOG.md modifications that needed to be reverted.

repo: The moltis repo underwent a history rewrite that changed commit SHAs, causing existing feature branches to diverge from origin/main.
CI enforces that CHANGELOG.md must not be modified in feature PRs — changelog changes cause CI failure.

code.finding: CHANGELOG.md was inadvertently included in the rebased diff and must not be changed in feature PRs per CI rules.

workflow: When rebasing after a repo history rewrite, apply feature-only diffs carefully to exclude housekeeping files like CHANGELOG.md.
Creating a backup branch before destructive rebase operations (e.g. settings-system-prompt-backup) is a safe practice for preserving original history.

friction: Repo history rewrite invalidated the existing feature branch, requiring manual rebase work (16 files, ~3.9K lines).
3 minor E2E test conflicts had to be resolved during rebase.
CI caught an inadvertent CHANGELOG.md change that had to be separately reverted after the PR was already created.
open_items: Backup branch settings-system-prompt-backup still exists and may need cleanup once PR #466 is merged.
CI status after the CHANGELOG.md revert should be confirmed to ensure all checks pass.
